title: Crisp Croatian Celeriac Bowl
description: A fresh, grassy bowl featuring roasted celeriac glazed with tempered chocolate, topped with dill, lemon zest, goat cheese and nuts for a springtime Croatian delight.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 200C and slice the celeriac into 1cm thick rounds.
Toss the celeriac slices with olive oil, sea salt, and smoked paprika, then roast on a sheet for 25 minutes until golden and crisp.
While the celeriac roasts, melt the chocolate in a double boiler over low heat, stirring until smooth.
Transfer the melted chocolate into a heat‑proof bowl and let it cool slightly before adding a splash of warm water and whisking to a glossy glaze.
When the celeriac is done, remove from the oven and drizzle the tempering chocolate glaze over the slices, letting it set for a minute.
Sprinkle fresh dill, lemon zest, roasted almonds, goat cheese crumbles, arugula, and parsley over the glazed celeriac.
Serve the bowl in a lacquerware bowl, letting the chocolate slightly harden while the greens remain fresh.
Garnish with extra crushed almonds and a lemon twist if desired.
